source: Blades in the Dark (authored from setting — no stat block PDF source)
note: FITD adversaries use tier/quality not D&D AC/HP. threat_level is narrative difficulty (1-4).

1.name: Bluecoat Watchman
1.description: A beat officer with a cudgel, whistles, and union-mandated cowardice.

1.name: Dockworker Thug
1.description: Muscle-for-hire with a hook and a bad attitude.

1.name: Weakened Ghost
1.description: A recently deceased soul still anchored by unresolved obsession.
1.weakness: electroplasmic rounds, ghost lanterns, compelling obsession

1.name: Gondolier Lookout
1.description: A union member with eyes like a hawk and loyalty to the guild.

1.name: Skovlan Refugee Fighter
1.description: Displaced by the Unity War, fighting for survival.

2.name: Bluecoat Sergeant
2.description: A hardened officer who has seen it all and takes cuts from every gang in the ward.

2.name: Spirit Warden Initiate
2.description: Masked, armed with a ghost-slayer, and very serious about electroplasm.
2.weakness: political pressure, whisper allies, Hull companions

2.name: Cровное Demon
2.description: A minor demon bound by a careless Whisper. It has more freedom than it should.
2.weakness: binding circles, true name, leviathan blood

2.name: Inspectors Agent
2.weakness: jurisdictional confusion, planted evidence, political interference

2.name: Assassins Blade
2.description: A contracted killer from the Shadows. Professional, patient, expensive.

3.name: Bluecoat Inspector
3.description: Backed by a full squad. Has read every report on your crew twice.

3.name: Spirit Warden Captain
3.description: A veteran of the Ghost Field. Has put down things that didn't have names.
3.weakness: Whisper allies with leverage, political pull

3.name: Greater Demon
3.description: An unbound entity of considerable power. It came through a tear that shouldn't have been made.
3.weakness: true name, leviathan blood, the right ritual

3.name: Whiskey Merchants Enforcer
3.description: A gang lieutenant with a reputation that precedes them.

4.name: Bluecoat Commander
4.description: A district commander with political backing, a full garrison, and a personal grudge.
4.weakness: impeachment, major political debt, irrefutable scandal

4.name: Spectral Engine
4.description: A mechanical construct imbued with a bound spirit. Walks. Thinks. Hates.
4.weakness: the spirit's true name, electroplasmic flood

4.name: Archon
4.description: A religious enforcer of the highest order. They don't forgive heresy.
4.weakness: exposure of corruption, rival sect, the Deathseeker Crows
